hero.subtitle: Full Stack Developer
hero.description: I build systems that scale and deliver what works — from microservices to frontend, from architecture to deployment.

about.label: Who I am
about.title: ABOUT
about.bio1: I've been passionate about technology since childhood — I started exploring computers at a young age and have maintained a strong curiosity for understanding how systems and technologies work ever since.
about.bio2: I developed a self-taught profile, always seeking to learn by doing, test solutions, and deepen my knowledge. I enjoy solving complex problems, tackling technical challenges, and working in environments that encourage continuous learning and professional growth.
about.bio3: I have experience with high-volume data systems, microservices architectures, and integration with IoT devices using specialized protocols such as SNMP and LwM2M.

highlights.title: Robust Backend
highlights.desc: REST APIs, microservices with Spring Boot, .NET, and Nest.js. Asynchronous communication with RabbitMQ.

highlights.title: Modern Frontend
highlights.desc: Reactive interfaces with Vue.js and Next.js. Experience with Electron for desktop apps.

highlights.title: Infrastructure
highlights.desc: Docker, DevOps, device integration via SNMP and LwM2M. High-availability systems.

highlights.title: Data at Scale
highlights.desc: 4TB+ database migration, automated web scraping, large-scale fiscal document processing.

highlights.title: AI-Powered Development
highlights.desc: Using AI agents (Claude Code, Cursor) to accelerate delivery, automated code review, and parallel task orchestration with multi-agents.

jobs.description: ICT company specialized in IoT device monitoring and management solutions.
items: Development and maintenance of services in a microservices architecture with Eureka and API Gateway.
Implementation of asynchronous communication using RabbitMQ.
Integration with devices using SNMP and LwM2M protocols.
Working with high-volume data systems and high-availability environments.
Client-facing requirements gathering and technical alignment meetings.

jobs.description: Startup focused on fiscal and tax automation for mid-to-large enterprises.
items: Feature development using Laravel, PHP, JavaScript, Python, Java, and Electron.
Implementation of web scraping routines for automated fiscal data extraction.
Download, processing, and integration of fiscal documents at scale.
DevOps work and application infrastructure maintenance.

jobs.description: Research and extension project from the Federal Institute of Rondônia (IFRO) focused on developing technology solutions for the community.
items: Frontend development using Next.js and Material UI.
Backend with Nest.js in a microservices architecture.
Docker for container creation and management.
Organization of containerized services for development.

tech.label: Tools
tech.title: TECHNOLOGIES
tech.description: Technologies I use daily to build robust and scalable solutions.

entries.title: Systems Analysis and Development
entries.description: Transferred from IFRO after moving to São Paulo. Continuing education in software development, software engineering, databases, and IT infrastructure.

entries.title: Systems Analysis and Development
entries.status: Up to 4th semester · Transferred to Cruzeiro do Sul

entries.title: Technical High School in Computer Science

contact.label: Contact
contact.description: I'm always open to discussing new projects, creative ideas, or opportunities to join your team.
